title: Going Home
subtitle: Jump to home with cd ~

sections.instruction: Sometimes you're deep in a folder tree and just want to go home. There's a shortcut.
Now jump straight home, no matter how deep you are.
sections.prompt: Type `cd ~` to jump straight home. `~` always means your home folder.

onSuccess.message: You're at `/home/user` — no matter how deep you were, `~` takes you home.

sections.instruction: You can also just type `cd` with nothing after it. Same result. Let's go back deep first — type `cd projects/website`.

onSuccess.message: You're deep again. Now try just `cd` with no arguments — it also takes you home. Both `cd` and `cd ~` are your 'panic button' when you feel lost.

completionMessage: Lost? Type `pwd` to see where you are. Type `cd ~` to go home. You can always start over.
